# Soft18 Handoff20 Hard52 Contract

## Soft 18
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.18 with quality bias floor 0.16 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 20
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.20 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Hard 52
hard block defaults to 0.52 with absolute trigger 36k for denser long-horizon reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
